customer_anxiety_profile: Informed, self-described knowledgeable buyer who tested the rep's honesty on the credit-qualifier framing and got an unsatisfying answer. Not hostile, but trust is not fully established. Will likely probe the closer on anything that sounds like a conflation or upsell framing.
unresolved_concerns: Credit-qualifier framing: Mike explicitly questioned whether the 650 credit score is Ion's requirement or a federal tax credit requirement. Joel never cleanly separated the two. Closer should address this proactively.

No usage history available: cabin was under construction for the past year, only 2-3 months livable. Design is based on 756 sq ft, not actual consumption data. Closer should set expectations accordingly.
No locked appointment time: the call ended with an unscheduled callback promise. Closer is calling into a soft commitment, not a confirmed slot.
Wife on title not included: a wife is identified as co-title holder but was not included in the callback arrangement. Closer must establish her presence before proceeding.
sensitive_topics_raised: Credit-qualifier credibility test: Mike said 'be straight with me' — he's watching for evasion. Closer should lead with transparency on Ion's requirements.
Remote/secondary property context: Mike lives in Texas; the cabin in Sulphur, Oklahoma is a secondary property. The pitch frame is reliability/backup, not bill savings.
Two structures on property: cabin (primary inquiry) and a fifth wheel with 40-foot carport. Closer should clarify scope of the design.
exact_promises_rep_made: Joel will have the design team build out a design based on 756 sq ft.
Joel will call Mike back once the design is finished to schedule the specialist call.
closer_should_know: Mike's primary motivation is power reliability (periodic outages at the cabin), not bill savings — this is a battery-backup conversation first, solar second. He is an informed buyer who caught a framing issue on the credit qualifier and was not fully satisfied with the answer. Lead with transparency on Ion's requirements, confirm the wife is on the call, and reset expectations that the design is square-footage-based given no usage history. The callback is unscheduled — closer is working to convert a soft promise into a confirmed appointment before the design conversation even begins.
